summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing for TaskLocal MVP. 13/15 backend pytest passed (86.7%). All frontend flows verified: login, tabs (Discover/Bookings/Chat/Profile), provider detail, booking creation, checkout screen. Two failures are config/key issues, not code bugs: (1) Emergent LLM key budget exceeded on /api/chat, (2) Stripe placeholder key rejected on /api/payments/checkout.

critical.issue: Returns 500 'AI error: Failed to start streaming completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - Budget has been exceeded! Current cost: 0.0, Max budget: 0.0'. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY (sk-emergent-d7c417d1673A3Dd715) has a 0.0 budget cap. Endpoint code itself is correct; needs a funded/valid key.

Returns 400 'Stripe error: Invalid API Key provided: sk_test_****gent'. STRIPE_API_KEY in backend/.env is a placeholder ('sk_test_emergent'), not a valid Stripe test key. Endpoint code correct; needs a real sk_test_... key.

integration_issues.issue: UI will surface backend 500 when user sends a message (LLM key budget). Message input & suggestion chips render fine.
Pressing Pay now will fail until STRIPE_API_KEY is set to a valid test key. UI displays 'Confirm & pay' screen correctly.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (React Native Web), 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated' — non-blocking but should migrate to style.boxShadow / style.pointerEvents to silence deprecation.

action_items: Provide/replace EMERGENT_LLM_KEY with one that has budget remaining OR verify the current key's budget with Emergent (currently Max budget: 0.0).
Replace STRIPE_API_KEY placeholder 'sk_test_emergent' in /app/backend/.env with a real Stripe test secret key (sk_test_...) and restart backend.
Optional: silence deprecated React Native Web props (shadow*, pointerEvents) in theme/styles.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py exceeds 700 lines (709) — consider splitting into routers (auth, providers, bookings, chat, payments, admin) and a seed module.
user_to_out(...).dict() uses deprecated Pydantic v1 API — prefer .model_dump() for Pydantic v2.
/api/chat is documented as non-streaming but internally uses chat.stream_message; works but rename or add /api/chat/simple for clarity.

/api/payments/checkout falls back to os.environ EXPO_PACKAGER_HOSTNAME when Origin header missing — good; but success_url path '/payment-return' does not exist as an Expo Router route (frontend routes to /checkout/[id]). Consider aligning redirect paths.
No rate-limiting on /api/auth/login (brute-force risk in prod).

success_rate.frontend: 100% of navigable flows; 0% of AI + Stripe pay-now due to backend config

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ users via /auth/register and TEST_ bookings via /bookings during pytest run. Also created a 'TEST Biz' provider through /providers/apply. Non-destructive to seeded demo/admin data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend up at EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Demo/admin creds seeded on startup. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_tasklocal.py — run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v. Once EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget and STRIPE_API_KEY are fixed, test_chat_ai and test_stripe_checkout should pass without further changes.
rca_of_issue: 1) LLM: emergentintegrations LlmChat routes via litellm proxy which reports Max budget: 0.0 for the provided key — server-side account/budget config, not code. 2) Stripe: STRIPE_API_KEY in /app/backend/.env is the literal string 'sk_test_emergent' which Stripe SDK rejects as invalid. Fix: swap to a real sk_test_... key and `sudo supervisorctl restart backend`.
